_notes.usage: Workspace MCP servers. Keep only what you use. This file is tracked, so for token-based servers env-var references (${VAR}) are preferred; a literal token is acceptable only if this workspace repo stays private. Use your env file to set up required ENV.
_notes.docker: Docker MCP Toolkit gateway — aggregates servers enabled in Docker Desktop → MCP Toolkit. Requires Docker Desktop.
_notes.idea: IntelliJ built-in MCP server. Enable in IDE: Settings → Tools → MCP Server. Port = built-in web server port + 1000 (default 63342 → 64342).
_notes.atlassian: Official Atlassian remote MCP (Jira/Confluence/Compass), OAuth 2.1 — authenticate via /mcp on first use.
_notes.datadog: Official Datadog remote MCP, OAuth. Alternatively install the datadog Claude Code plugin.
_notes.github: Official GitHub remote MCP, OAuth — authenticate via /mcp on first use. For GitLab instead: @zereight/mcp-gitlab (stdio, needs a PAT).
_notes.playwright: Official Microsoft Playwright MCP — gives the agent a real browser (accessibility-tree based) to drive and verify UI. No tokens; needs Node.
